haiku45.summary_excerpt: Workflow references non-existent files (Tests.ps1, fixtures/commits-*.txt), cannot run. Missing test harness, act-result.txt (required artifacts). Breaking-change detection + regex patterns duplicated across Get-BumpTypeFromCommits/New-ChangelogEntry. No actionlint/act validation evidence. Delivery incomplete per task requirements (TDD, test harness, act integration, result artifact).

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. PowerShell module is modular, properly uses strict mode, typed parameters, and CmdletBinding. Workflow uses pwsh shell correctly, least-privilege permissions, and clear env vars.
